summary: E2E frontend testing of Mess Dekho React app (localStorage-backed, no backend). Executed 21 functional checks across Home search, PG Listing filters, PG Details gallery/tabs, auth (login/signup), protected routes, role restrictions, user booking + cancel, owner dashboard + add PG + approve booking, admin approve/delete user. 18/21 passed directly. Remaining 3 were test-script issues (not app bugs) — confirmed by manual inspection: (a) listing grid skeleton caught mid-load, (b) Mumbai filter correctly returned 1 result, (c) owner/admin dashboards use sidebar-logout-btn instead of nav-logout-btn (by design). No functional defects found.

issues: Sidebar logout uses icon-only button with tooltip; no visible text label for logout could confuse some users, but has data-testid='sidebar-logout-btn'

critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext seeds localStorage only if keys missing — edits to SEED_PGS/SEED_USERS/SEED_BOOKINGS won't reflect for returning users without localStorage.clear(); consider a SEED_VERSION key.
OwnerDashboard shows PGs where ownerId === user.id OR ownerId === 'owner-1' (confirmed via problem statement) — this is a demo hack and should be removed before production.
Home.jsx Popular Cities tiles reuse only 2 images (Pune vs FOOD_IMG) for all 6 cities — visually repetitive.
MyBookings cancel uses window.confirm (native dialog) rather than a shadcn AlertDialog; inconsistent with the rest of the polished UI.
No SEED_USERS password hashing — acceptable for frontend-only mock but must never ship to prod.
Auth.jsx allows signup with role='admin' from the public UI — security risk if ever wired to a real backend.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all functional flows work; 3 test-script misses corrected by inspection)

test_credentials: Resident: user@messdekho.com / password; Owner: owner@messdekho.com / password; Admin: admin@messdekho.com / password (seed data from /app/frontend/src/data/mockData.js). Also written to /app/memory/test_credentials.md context.
seed_data_creation: Script created one owner-added PG titled 'TEST_NewPG' and one signup owner 'TEST_new<timestamp>@test.com'. These live in browser localStorage only; cleared by end-user clearing site data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only app, all data in localStorage (keys: md_users, md_pgs, md_bookings, md_session). To reset: run localStorage.clear() in devtools or incognito. Important testids: home-search-* (form), filter-* (listing), tab-* (details), book-now-btn, cancel-booking-<id>, add-pg-btn, pg-form-submit, admin-approve-<id>, admin-delete-user-<id>, sidebar-logout-btn (owner/admin), nav-logout-btn (navbar pages). Role-based landing on login: admin->/admin, owner->/owner, user->redirect or /.
rca of the issue: N/A - no defects identified. Minor test-script assertion mistakes were: (1) queried listings-grid before skeleton finished rendering — real DOM does show the grid; (2) text match for Mumbai filter didn't account for 'X stays' copy; (3) expected nav-logout-btn on owner dashboard but that page uses DashboardLayout's sidebar-logout-btn.
